subtitle: All 3 Prompt Packs — 130 Prompts + Production Code

description_gumroad:
## Everything You Need to Automate Your Blog — $49 (Save $18)

Get all 3 prompt packs in one bundle:

### Pack 1: SEO Article Writer Mega Pack (50 prompts) — Value: $19
Keyword research, article generation, on-page SEO, content enhancement, technical SEO.

### Pack 2: WordPress Automation Kit (30 prompts + code) — Value: $29
REST API scripts, bulk publishing, internal linking, analytics, full pipeline automation.

### Pack 3: Affiliate Content Generator (50 prompts) — Value: $19
Comparison articles, reviews, CTA optimization, Japanese market ASP templates.

---

### Total: 130 prompts + production code
### Individual value: $67 → Bundle price: $49 (27% OFF)

---

### What Makes This Different

These prompts are **extracted from a real production system** that:
- Publishes 3+ articles per week automatically
- Runs internal linking every Friday
- Generates weekly analytics reports
- Manages affiliate links across 3 sites
- Tracks keywords and rankings

Every prompt has been refined through hundreds of runs. What didn't work was removed. What performed well was kept and improved.

### The Complete Pipeline

```
Keyword Research → Content Planning → Article Writing → SEO Optimization
    → Internal Linking → Affiliate Link Insertion → Publishing
        → Social Promotion → Analytics → Content Refresh
```

This bundle covers every step.

### Included Files
```
ultimate-ai-blogger-bundle/
├── 01-seo-article-writer-mega-pack.md    (50 prompts)
├── 02-wordpress-automation-prompt-kit.md  (30 prompts + code)
├── 03-affiliate-content-generator.md      (50 prompts)
└── README.md
```

### Who This Is For
- Solo bloggers who want to 3x their output
- Affiliate marketers building content at scale
- WordPress developers automating client sites
- Content agencies standardizing their workflow
- Anyone serious about content-driven revenue

### FAQ

**Q: What AI models do these work with?**
A: Any LLM — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Llama, Mistral. The prompts are model-agnostic.

**Q: Do I need coding skills for the WordPress kit?**
A: Basic Python knowledge helps. The code is well-commented and ready to run.

**Q: Is the Affiliate pack only for Japanese markets?**
A: It includes Japan-specific templates (A8.net, moshimo) but most prompts work globally.

**Q: Will these prompts get my content ranked?**
A: The prompts produce well-structured, SEO-optimized content. Rankings depend on many factors (domain authority, backlinks, competition), but these prompts give your content the best possible on-page foundation.

**130 prompts. Production code. Complete pipeline. Start now.**
